<!--
Thanks for contributing to FireYak! 🚒
Keep the PR title in Conventional Commit format (it becomes the squash-merge
commit and feeds the auto-generated changelog), e.g.:
  feat(map): add water tank capacity filter
  fix(offline): handle tile download abort
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? One or two sentences. -->

Closes #<!-- issue number, if any -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] 🧹 Refactoring / chore (no user-facing change)
- [ ] 📖 Documentation

## How was it tested?

<!-- Check every platform you verified on. Web is the minimum for most changes. -->

- [ ] Web (`npm run dev` / built bundle)
- [ ] Android (device or emulator)
- [ ] iOS (device or simulator)
- [ ] Not applicable (docs/CI only)

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] `npm run build` and lint pass locally
- [ ] New user-facing strings added to **both** `src/locales/en.json` and `src/locales/de.json`
- [ ] What's New entry added to `src/assets/whats-new.json` (en + de) for user-facing changes — see `AGENTS.md` §6 for the format

- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or personal data in the diff
- [ ] Screenshots attached for UI changes
